untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'accumulation tightness' and 'activity intensity' which are qualitative pattern-recognition concepts not directly available in allowed indicator set. vol_ratio_20 approximates volume intensity but does not capture price tightness or order flow dynamics. Resistance level definition (r1/pivot system used as proxy) and lookback_period parameterization cannot be fully expressed with given constraints.
translation_notes: Translated using pivot points (r1/s1) as resistance/support proxies. Vol_ratio_20 used to enforce volume intensity requirement (>1.5x baseline for entry, requiring sustained >1.0x for continuation). Close confirmation required above/below resistance. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal. Stop loss set conservatively at 2% given emphasis on quality breakouts. Cannot fully capture 'order flow intensity' or precise accumulation tightness detection without additional volume profile or order flow indicators.
